title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a large GPU cluster, addressing a structural weakness: lack of vertical integration in chips and infrastructure compared to competitors. The analysis argues the AI competitive advantage is shifting from model benchmarks toward control of chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure.
